name: EasyMultiProfiler
desc_en: A user-oriented multi-omics analysis and visualization platform.
desc_zh: 面向用户的多组学分析与可视化平台。

name: EasyMicroPlot
desc_en: An R package for downstream microbiome analysis and publication-ready visualization.
desc_zh: 用于微生物组下游分析与论文级可视化的R包。

name: DeepScreening
desc_en: Deep-learning-enabled virtual screening for rapid drug discovery.
desc_zh: 基于深度学习的虚拟筛选与快速药物发现平台。

name: TCMIO
desc_en: A database for exploring traditional Chinese medicine in immuno-oncology.
desc_zh: 用于探索中医药免疫肿瘤机制的综合数据库。

name: DenovoProfiling
desc_en: A web server for profiling de novo generated molecular libraries.
desc_zh: 用于从头生成分子库性能评估的网络服务器。

name: ResearchHub
desc_en: An AI-assisted literature, note-taking and protein/peptide design workspace.
desc_zh: 融合文献检索、笔记与蛋白/肽设计的AI科研工作台。
